form.label: Admin: Generate Sample Data
form.description: Inject synthetic (synthetic="true") wearable events for a chosen person, replayed from the shipped wearable_samples.csv through the real TA normalization. Admin-only (requires can_collect). Choose a person + range and click Submit.

search.query: | inputlookup wearable_person_profile | table person_id person_name | sort person_id

div.p: Replays the shipped wearable_samples.csv (one authentic-shaped event of every Oura and Garmin sourcetype) into index=wearables via collect output_format=hec, so the events pass through the same TA normalization the live fetchers feed. Each event is stamped synthetic="true" and the selected person_id, sprayed across the chosen number of days.

ul.li: Each Submit re-injects a batch — clicking twice doubles the data. The nightly dedup search will collapse exact duplicates, or clean up manually below.
Events appear within a few seconds of Submit (they go through indexing).

div.h3: Clean up (run in Search — set the time range to All time; | delete obeys the picker)

search.query: | inputlookup wearable_samples.csv | search $sample_vendor$ | eval day=mvrange(0,$sample_days$) | mvexpand day | eval _time=relative_time(now(),"-".day."d@d") + tonumber(offset_sec) | eval _raw=replace(_raw,"__PERSON__","$sample_person$") | eval _raw=replace(_raw,"__DAY__",strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d")) | fields _raw _time sourcetype | collect index=wearables output_format=hec | stats count as events by sourcetype | sort sourcetype
